groups.name: Modern American Canasta
groups.notes: Scraped Mar 11 10:30 PM - 4 new entries. FB067 (Alberta Catherine, wild card canasta scoring - count both canasta bonus AND card points inside, 6 comments unanimous). FB068 (Robin Shane Rashkind, opening with one card left - depends on turn card: before=can discard last card and draw talon, after=must keep a card, 47 comments split with majority). FB069 (Shoshana Fluss Pilevsky, going out final discard is face down - any card works, 14 comments unanimous). FB070 (Ellen Leikind, opening strategy at 125 level - situational based on deck position/opponent status/pairs, 6 comments general agreement). Skipped: Lynda Greenberg (LFG Delray), Modern American Canasta (live event promo).
